hooks.prompt: If the file being written is inside src/*-mcp-server/, verify it follows the expected project structure from DESIGN_GUIDELINES.md (license header, correct package nesting under awslabs/). Only FAIL if the structure is clearly wrong. Pass silently otherwise.

Before finishing: if any files were modified inside src/*-mcp-server/ during this session, remind the user to run tests with 'uv run --frozen pytest --cov --cov-branch' in the affected server directory. Do NOT block — just add a reminder.
